postmark.Subject: Refinance — Patricia Simmons
postmark.TextBody:
Hi Franco,

New refinance opportunity for Patricia Simmons.

Property: 287 Glencairn Avenue, Toronto, ON M5N 1V3
Property value (appraised): $920,000
Existing first mortgage: Scotiabank, balance $380,000
Loan amount requested: $460,000 (refinance pull-out)
LTV: approximately 50%

Borrower: Patricia Simmons, senior planner at Stantec for 8 years. Recent NOA attached.

I've attached the complete package: loan application, mortgage statement, appraisal, and NOA.

Thanks,
Jason Mercer
Mercer Mortgage Group
Lic. #M12001505
